scripts.build: npm run build -w poker-shared && npm run build -w pokerserver && npm run build -w poker-game
scripts.dev: npm run build -w poker-shared && concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w pokerserver" "npm run dev -w poker-game"
scripts.test: npm run test -w pokerserver && npm run test -w poker-game
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start -w pokerserver" "npm run preview -w poker-game -- --host 127.0.0.1"
